title: OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services related to alcohol, drug, and gambling addiction. Services include mental health evaluation, medication management, counseling, and referrals to residential treatment and other community resources. 606 Medical Parkway Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Wednesday 7am-7pm, Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am-noon, Saturday 9am-1pm (541) 426-4524 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 426-4524 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts Medicaid (OHP), Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees and payment plans available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: By appointment only Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention DUI Offender Programs Gambling Disorder Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH AND COUNSELING SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - ASSERTIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS
